projects.title: Live Care Journey Tracker
projects.description: Provide patients & family real-time visibility into lab status, physician rounds, and medication schedules.

projects.title: Interactive Room Transition Map
projects.description: Smooth transfers between Emergency, Surgery, Post-Anesthesia Care Unit (PACU), and Inpatient Wards.

projects.title: Automated Discharge Enablement
projects.description: Streamline pharmacy prescriptions, follow-up appointments, and post-acute transport care.

projects.title: Triage Severity Scoring
projects.description: Implement Emergency Severity Index (ESI Levels 1-5) automated EHR tag upon patient intake.

projects.title: Bed Allocation Latency Optimization
projects.description: Decrease median triage-to-bed time from 48 minutes to < 18 minutes.

projects.title: Digital Care Team Handoff Protocol
projects.description: Mandatory digital SBAR (Situation, Background, Assessment, Recommendation) checklist prior to ward transfer.
